description: Synthetic autoscaling control-plane SLOs, latency, target response distribution, inventory, and logs.

panels.description: PASS requires every selected check to expose a current successful result. No data is shown as ATTENTION.
panels.title: Current Check Result

panels.description: Number of selected autoscaling-check runners currently publishing metadata.
panels.title: Active Check Types

panels.description:
How often within the currently selected time range the SLO was broken (0 - good)
Overall SLO captures the whole check
panels.title: Overall SLO Breach

panels.description: How often within the currently selected time range the SLO was broken (0 - good)
panels.title: Scale UUp SLO Breach

panels.description: How often within the currently selected time range the SLO was broken (0 - good)
panels.title: Scale Down SLO Breach

panels.description: PASS requires every selected check to expose a current successful result. No data is shown as ATTENTION.
panels.title: Check Result over Time

panels.description: Age of the oldest last-run timestamp among selected checks.
panels.title: Stalest Check

panels.description:
Worst current selected check duration as a percentage of the selected overall SLO. Values above 100% breach the SLO.

Overall SLO captures the whole check
panels.title: Overall SLO Budget Depleted

panels.description: How much budget for SLO is gone (100 - bad, 0 - good)
panels.title: Scale Up SLO Budget Depleted

panels.description: How much budget for SLO is gone (100 - bad, 0 - good)
panels.title: Scale Down SLO Budget Depleted

panels.description: Percentage of scraped latest-run gauge samples within each selected SLO over the dashboard range. Runners use a fixed interval, so this approximates run-level compliance.
panels.title: Sampled SLO Compliance

panels.description: Worst selected-check p95 and p99 of sampled latest-run gauges over the selected time range.
panels.title: Historical Latency Quantiles

panels.description: Latest bounded result and step status labels emitted by each selected runner.
panels.title: Current Result Details

panels.description: End-to-end duration of the latest completed synthetic autoscaling check, with the selected SLO threshold.
panels.title: Check Duration vs Overall SLO

panels.description: Latency contribution of each check step. Scale-up and scale-down are the primary reaction-time indicators.
panels.title: Step Duration

panels.description: Current duration of every emitted check step.
panels.title: Current Step Breakdown - $check

panels.description: Deployment replica counts observed after scale-up and scale-down.
panels.title: Observed Target Replicas

panels.description: Current duration of every emitted check step.
panels.title: Current Step Breakdown

panels.description: Rate-based heatmap of response_delay_seconds histogram observations from selected target services.
panels.title: Response Delay Distribution

panels.description: p50, p95, p99, and average response delay derived from the target histogram, compared with the selected response SLO.
panels.title: Response Latency Percentiles

panels.description: Static labels from kedify_autoscaling_check_info for every selected runner.
panels.title: Runner Metadata

panels.description: Deployment inventory built from kube-state-metrics and the chart check/role labels.

targets.expr: max by (namespace, deployment, label_app_kubernetes_io_instance, label_autoscaling_checks_kedify_io_check, label_autoscaling_checks_kedify_io_role) (kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready{namespace=~"$namespace"} * on (namespace, deployment) group_left(label_app_kubernetes_io_instance, label_autoscaling_checks_kedify_io_check, label_autoscaling_checks_kedify_io_role) kube_deployment_labels{namespace=~"$namespace",label_app_kubernetes_io_name="autoscaling-checks",label_app_kubernetes_io_instance=~"$release",label_autoscaling_checks_kedify_io_check=~"$check"})

panels.title: Runner and Target Workloads

panels.description: Logs from selected autoscaling-check runner pods.
panels.title: Check Runners

panels.description: Logs from selected autoscaling-check target pods.
panels.title: Check Targets

list.description: How often (for selected time range in grafana) the SLO must hold
list.label: SLO Percent
list.name: slo_p

title: Kedify / Autoscaling Checks
